title: Brand Intelligence
overviewBullets: Build stronger brand equity and differentiation
overviewDescription: Understand how your brand is perceived, differentiated, and positioned in the market.
description: Understand how your brand is perceived, differentiated, and positioned in the market. We help you strengthen brand equity, clarify messaging, and build a brand that customers prefer—and competitors can't easily replicate.

delivers.heading: Brand Positioning & Differentiation
delivers.body: Clarify your unique position in the market and the key differentiators that set you apart from competitors.

delivers.heading: Brand Perception & Sentiment Analysis
delivers.body: Measure how your brand is perceived across customers, prospects, and stakeholders using qualitative and quantitative signals.

delivers.heading: Messaging & Narrative Audit
delivers.body: Evaluate the clarity, consistency, and impact of your brand story, value propositions, and core messaging across touchpoints.

delivers.heading: Brand Equity & Strength Assessment
delivers.body: Assess brand awareness, relevance, trust, advocacy, and loyalty to identify strengths to build on and gaps to close.

delivers.heading: Brand Architecture & Portfolio Clarity
delivers.body: Review your brand hierarchy, sub-brands, and product naming strategy to ensure clarity and strategic alignment.

keyQuestions: How is our brand perceived by our target audiences?
What makes our brand unique—and is it resonating?
How does our brand compare to key competitors?
What are the strongest and weakest aspects of our brand equity?
Is our messaging clear, consistent, and compelling?
What brand associations do we own—and which do we not want?
How can we strengthen brand preference and loyalty?
What is our brand's future opportunity space?

items.title: 2. Acquire Evidence

items.title: 4. Analyze & Synthesize
items.description: Identify patterns, drivers, and contradictions across evidence.

items.title: 5. Identify Opportunities

items.description: Deliver actionable insights, strategic recommendations, and next steps.

evidenceItems: All insights are grounded in verifiable sources and transparent methodology—so you can act with clarity and confidence.

title: Experience Intelligence
overviewDescription: Understand the end-to-end experiences your customers have with your brand across every touchpoint.
description: Understand the end-to-end experiences your customers have with your brand across every touchpoint. We help you uncover friction, emotion, expectation gaps, and moments that matter—so you can design experiences that delight, retain, and drive meaningful growth.

delivers.body: Map the complete customer journey across channels, devices, and touchpoints to reveal real experiences and breakdowns.

overviewBullets: Diagnose conversion leaks across the funnel

overviewDescription: Understand how visitors become customers—and where they drop off.
description: Understand how visitors become customers—and where they drop off. We identify conversion barriers, optimize the customer journey, improve UX and offers, and help you increase conversion rate, average order value, and revenue.

delivers.heading: Conversion Funnel Analysis
delivers.body: Analyze performance across every step of the funnel to identify drop-offs, friction points, and opportunities to increase conversions.

delivers.heading: UX, Friction & Barrier Detection

delivers.heading: Offer & Message Effectiveness

delivers.heading: Checkout & Revenue Optimization

How can we increase average order value (AOV)?
How do we improve checkout completion rate?
What trust or assurance signals are missing?
What tests or optimizations will have the biggest impact?

overviewBullets: Analyze revenue, pricing, offers, and margin

description: Understand what drives commercial performance—including offers, pricing, promotions, bundles, margins, discounts, market viability, and financial opportunity. We help you make smarter commercial decisions that improve profitability, efficiency, and growth.

delivers.heading: Commercial Performance Analysis
delivers.body: Analyze revenue, margin, profit, AOV, ASP, units sold, discounts, and return on promotions by offer, product, segment, and channel.

keyQuestions: What commercial levers drive the highest profitability?
Which offers, products, or bundles perform best?
Where are we giving too much discount—and losing margin?
What pricing changes could increase profit without reducing demand?
Which customer segments are most commercially valuable?
Which promotions drive incremental lift vs. cannibalization?
What is our true margin after discounts and returns?
How can we improve AOV and revenue per customer?
What commercial risks or exposures should we manage?
What actions will have the biggest commercial impact?

items.title: 1. Define Scope & Objectives
items.description: Align on operational goals, KPIs, processes, systems, and success metrics.

items.title: 2. Acquire & Consolidate Evidence
items.description: Collect data from systems, reports, logs, dashboards, teams, interviews, and docs.

items.title: 3. Validate Quality & Coverage
items.description: Assess data quality, completeness, recency, and confidence (E0–E5).

items.title: 4. Analyze & Synthesize
items.description: Identify bottlenecks, cost drivers, risks, gaps, and root cause patterns.

items.title: 5. Prioritize Opportunities

items.title: 6. Recommend & Report
items.description: Deliver actionable recommendations, roadmap, and measurement plan.

evidenceItems: All insights are grounded in verifiable sources and transparent methodology—so you can act with clarity and confidence.

title: Executive Intelligence
overviewBullets: Provide tailored insights for strategic decisions
Align teams around data-backed growth strategies
overviewDescription: Deliver the highest-value insights executives need to lead with confidence.
description: Deliver the highest-value insights executives need to lead with confidence. We synthesize multi-domain intelligence into clear, strategic, decision-ready perspectives that reveal what matters most, why it matters, and what to do next.

delivers.heading: Executive Priorities & Performance Overview
delivers.body: Highlight the most important metrics, trends, and risks across the business at a glance.

delivers.heading: Strategic Insight & Theme Synthesis
delivers.body: Synthesize cross-domain intelligence into key themes, opportunities, and threats shaping the business.

delivers.heading: Decision Support & Recommendations
delivers.body: Provide evidence-aware recommendations and options to support high-impact executive decisions.

delivers.heading: Forward-Looking Outlook & Scenarios
delivers.body: Assess likely future outcomes, risks, and upside under multiple scenarios and assumptions.

delivers.heading: Governance, Risk & Confidence Overview
delivers.body: Surface critical risks, confidence levels, open questions, and governance considerations for leadership.

keyQuestions: What are the top priorities for executive attention right now?
How is the business performing against its most critical goals?
What are the biggest risks to our growth and profitability?
What opportunities will create the most strategic impact?
Where are we underinvesting—or overinvesting?
How do our performance and risks compare to last quarter?
What decisions require executive action in the next 30–90 days?
What scenarios should we plan for—and how should we prepare?
How confident should we be in our current direction?
What will move the needle the most for the business?

items.title: Business Performance

items.description: High-impact opportunities, white spaces, and strategic moves that drive growth.

items.description: Critical decisions, recommended actions, owners, and timing considerations.

items.title: Outlook & Scenarios
items.description: Forecasts, scenarios, assumptions, and potential future outcomes.

items.title: 5. Prioritize & Recommend
